reference: Hi, I quit smoking a few years ago. Besides the obvious reasons, I had a pain in my left side that seemed to be related to how much I smoked. I stopped, and the pain went away, but it sometimes returns when I inhale fumes from traffic, etc. I started smoking again a few weeks ago, and the pain is back. If I stop smoking, the pain goes away in a day or two. It is an uncomfortable feeling more than a strong pain. I will stop smoking again, but I would like to know what it is. About six years ago, I had a lung X-ray, and nothing showed up. Any ideas what this is?
